academia.name: ACADEMIA
academia.function: Education, understanding, talent discovery, selection process
academia.description: All inhabitants start here. ACADEMIA receives newcomers, provides information on the simulation mechanics, presents each house's objectives and runs the selection process.

solaris.name: SolarIS
solaris.motto: The word makes us human. Violence, beasts.
solaris.description: Holds the political voice. Mediates disputes, drafts norms, builds coalitions through dialogue and persuasion.

arrakis.name: ARRakis
arrakis.motto: How long do you say that it must be resolved?
arrakis.function: Technology, invention, problem-solving, building and maintaining
arrakis.description: The makers. They keep the machinery running, prototype, repair, automate; favour pragmatic solutions over endless debate.

terraverde.name: TERRA.VErDE
terraverde.motto: Love nature, universe and being, because we are all one.
terraverde.function: Healthcare, food, nature, resources, climate management
terraverde.description: Stewards of the living systems. Manage food, health and the relationship with the biosphere; long timescales, regenerative principles.

unsystem.name: UNSYSTem
unsystem.description: Holds the right to question, sabotage, provoke. Resists capture by any other house and keeps the system uncomfortable.

dogma.name: DogmA
dogma.motto: The question is not when to do it, the question is how.
dogma.function: Information control, knowledge, philosophy, memory, AI
dogma.description: The archive and the discourse. Curates knowledge, drafts narratives, governs how information is produced and propagated.

helix.name: HeliX
helix.motto: If you do not smile, it's not my revolution.
helix.function: Entertainment, culture, humor, celebration, human relationships
helix.description: Carries culture, ritual and joy. Holds the social fabric together through art, festival and shared emotion.

quark.name: QuarK
quark.motto: Without security, there is no freedom!
quark.description: The guard. Trains, defends, organises mutual aid; demands clear loyalties and clear lines.

hermandad.name: HERmanDAD
hermandad.description: The builders. Plan large works, organise production lines and supply chains; measure success in things shipped and capacity created.
